name: Coca-Cola Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in oil for ten minutes on each side; remove to crockpot.
2. Drain fat.
3. Break up tomatoes in their juice; add remaining ingredients, stirring until spaghetti sauce mix is dissolved.
4. Pour over meat. Cover; simmer until meat is tender.
5. Thicken gravy; serve over sliced meat.
